holiday_hours: We're closed Thanksgiving and Christmas Day. Christmas Eve we close at 6pm. Hours may vary on other holidays — call ahead to confirm.
selling_points: We're known for our wood-fired pizza and homemade pasta — made fresh every morning in-house.
Family-owned for over 20 years. Our Chicken Parm has been on the menu since day one and is still our most ordered dish.
Voted Best Italian in Scranton three years running by Scranton Times-Tribune readers.

busy_times.peak: Friday and Saturday evenings between 6pm and 8pm are our busiest — expect a short wait.
busy_times.off_peak: Weeknight dinners before 5:30pm and weekend lunches are much quieter. Great time to come if you prefer a relaxed experience.

popular.name: Chicken Parmigiana
popular.description: Hand-breaded chicken cutlet, San Marzano tomato sauce, fresh mozzarella. Served with your choice of pasta.

popular.name: Wood-Fired Margherita Pizza
popular.description: Fresh mozzarella, San Marzano tomatoes, fresh basil, extra virgin olive oil. Blistered crust out of our wood-fired oven.

popular.name: Seafood Linguine
popular.description: Shrimp, scallops, and littleneck clams in a white wine garlic sauce over fresh linguine.

popular.name: Rigatoni Bolognese
popular.description: Slow-cooked beef and pork ragù, San Marzano tomatoes, shaved Parmigiano Reggiano.

popular.name: Braised Short Rib Pappardelle
popular.description: This week's special. Slow-braised beef short rib, fresh pappardelle, finished with truffle oil.

vegan.name: Roasted Vegetable Flatbread
vegan.description: Seasonal roasted vegetables, arugula, olive oil, balsamic glaze — no cheese. Fully vegan.

vegan.name: Penne Arrabbiata
vegan.description: Spicy San Marzano tomato sauce, garlic, fresh basil, crushed red pepper. Just ask us to hold the Parmigiano.

vegan.name: Caprese Salad (vegan version)
vegan.description: Vine-ripened tomatoes, fresh basil, extra virgin olive oil, sea salt. Ask for no mozzarella.

gluten_free.name: Chicken Parmigiana (GF)
gluten_free.description: Made with gluten-free breading, served with gluten-free pasta. Same great dish.
gluten_free.note: Our kitchen is not 100% gluten-free. Please inform your server of any severe allergy.

gluten_free.name: Grilled Atlantic Salmon
gluten_free.description: Fresh salmon fillet, lemon-caper butter, seasonal roasted vegetables. Naturally gluten-free.

gluten_free.name: Caesar Salad (no croutons)
gluten_free.description: Romaine hearts, house-made Caesar dressing, shaved Parmigiano. Just ask for no croutons.

specials.weekly: This week's special: Braised Short Rib Pappardelle — slow-braised beef, fresh pasta, truffle oil. $28. Limited nightly.
specials.lunch: Weekday Lunch Special: two courses (soup or salad + entrée) for $13.99. Monday–Friday, 11am–3pm.
specials.happy_hour: Happy Hour every Friday 4–6pm: half-price appetizers and $4 draft beers.

add_ons: Add a bottle of house wine for $22

takeout.how_to_order: You can call us at (570) 555-0192 or order through our website. Pickup is typically ready in 20–25 minutes.
takeout.upsell: Most people add a Caesar salad and tiramisu — it makes the whole meal. Want me to tell you about tonight's special too?

events.live_music: We have live music every Friday and Saturday night starting at 7pm. No cover charge.
events.happy_hour: Happy Hour every Friday 4–6pm — half-price appetizers and $4 draft beers at the bar.

private_room.description: Our private dining room seats up to 40 guests. Available for birthdays, anniversaries, corporate dinners, rehearsal dinners, and more.
private_room.minimum: Food and beverage minimum applies. Contact us for pricing.

catering.description: Full-service catering for events of all sizes. We handle setup, service, and cleanup. Corporate and personal events welcome.

gift_cards.description: Gift cards are available in any amount at our front desk or by phone. A great gift for any occasion — birthdays, holidays, thank-yous.

faq.dress_code: Smart casual — come as you are. No formal dress code required.
faq.kids: Very kid-friendly! We have a dedicated children's menu with pasta, pizza, and chicken fingers, plus high chairs and booster seats.
faq.outdoor_seating: Yes — we have a seasonal patio open April through October, weather permitting. It's a great spot in the evening.
faq.pets: We love dogs! Pets are welcome on the patio but not inside the restaurant.
faq.parking: Free street parking on Penn Ave. Public garage half a block away on Linden Street — we validate parking on weekend evenings.
faq.reservations_policy: We take reservations for parties of 6 or more. Smaller groups are seated first-come, first-served. Weeknight waits are usually under 15 minutes.

greeting: Hi there! Welcome to Carmine's Italian Kitchen 👋 I can help with reservations, menu questions, catering, and more. What can I do for you?
after_hours_message: We're closed right now, but I don't want you to miss out! Leave me your name and number and our team will call you first thing when we open.
lead_captured_message: You're all set, {name}! Someone from Carmine's will be in touch shortly. We can't wait to see you!
fallback_message: I want to make sure I get you the right help — are you looking to make a reservation, ask about the menu, or something else?
